content_fingerprint: openai begins testing ads inside chatgpt for free tier users openai has started displaying ads inside chatgpt as part of a broader effort to sustain free access to the product according to an announcement published may 7 2026 openai confirmed it is now testing advertisements inside chatgpt with the initiative aimed at funding the company s free tier access model the rollout includes explicit labeling of sponsored content guarantees that ads do not influence ai generated answers and stated commitments to privacy protections and user controls the announcement emphasizes that chatgpt s responses
